error_signature: OIDC discovery endpoint does not use configured proxy
title: OIDC discovery endpoint ignoring proxy settings
symptom: The OIDC discovery endpoint requests do not route through the configured proxy, while other requests do. This leads to connectivity issues when the proxy is required.
applies_when: Proxy settings are configured via environment variables
not_this_if: Proxy settings are not needed for the OIDC requests
root_cause: The OIDC discovery endpoint requests utilize Node.js's `http`/`https` modules, which do not automatically inherit proxy settings from environment variables. This results in the requests bypassing the configured proxy settings.
fix_steps: Add lowercase proxy environment variables: `http_proxy`, `https_proxy`, and `all_proxy` alongside the existing uppercase ones.
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Set the lowercase proxy environment variables and restart n8n.
